title: Top 5 Claude Cowork Tips I Wish I Knew from Day One
summary: Jeff Su presents five foundational practices for using Claude Cowork effectively after three months of running his business on the platform. Key tips include keeping CLAUDE.md lean, structuring MEMORY.md properly, archiving outdated content, migrating Claude Projects into Cowork workstations, and distinguishing when to use skills versus workstations.
